subject: [PATCH v2 4/9] nfsd: guard nfsd_serv deref in nfsd_file_net_dispose

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the nfsd service thread loop where it attempts to wake up a NULL svc_serv pointer, leading to a dereference error. The fix involves loading the nn->nfsd_serv pointer into a local variable and only calling svc_wake_up() when it is non-NULL. This matches the pattern used in the sibling helper function nfsd_file_dispose_list_delayed(). The patch addresses an issue introduced by a previous commit that left file closing work to a work queue, which was fixed with this change.
